style: AAA / cinematic game foley — the quality bar is top-tier console/film sound design (think Zelda, God of War, Lord of the Rings), NOT retro chiptune. Realistic, layered, punchy, production-clean one-shots.

sounds.name: Coin Pickup
sounds.description: a bright, short metallic jingle played when the player picks up a gold coin
sounds.usage: Play on gold_coin / gold_ingot pickup and shop sales.

sounds.name: Gem Pickup
sounds.description: a sparkly ascending chime for collecting a gem or valuable
sounds.usage: Play on gem_ruby and other high-value pickups.

sounds.name: Item Get
sounds.description: a cheerful little fanfare for receiving a new item into the inventory
sounds.usage: Play when a tool or item enters the inventory.

sounds.name: Menu Select
sounds.description: a soft neutral blip when moving the cursor between menu options
sounds.usage: Cursor movement in menus and dialogs.

sounds.name: Menu Confirm
sounds.description: a bright positive blip confirming a menu choice
sounds.usage: Confirming/accepting a selection.

sounds.name: Menu Cancel
sounds.description: a low descending blip for backing out or cancelling
sounds.usage: Cancel / back / close a menu.

sounds.name: Error Buzz
sounds.description: a short harsh buzz signalling an invalid or blocked action
sounds.usage: Invalid action, not enough money, blocked placement.

sounds.name: Notification
sounds.description: a gentle two-note tone announcing a notification or new message
sounds.usage: New chat message / quest notification.

sounds.name: Chest Open
sounds.description: a rising creak-and-clunk as a wooden chest is opened
sounds.usage: Opening wooden_chest / containers.

sounds.name: Chest Close
sounds.description: a short wooden thud as a chest lid closes
sounds.usage: Closing wooden_chest / containers.

sounds.name: Key Unlock
sounds.description: a metallic click-clunk of a key turning in a lock
sounds.usage: Using iron_key / unlocking a door or chest.

sounds.name: Drink Potion
sounds.description: a bubbly gulp-and-sparkle of drinking a potion
sounds.usage: Consuming a potion / healing item.

sounds.name: Eat Food
sounds.description: a soft munch-and-satisfied blip of eating food
sounds.usage: Eating a food item to restore energy.

sounds.name: Sword Swing
sounds.description: a quick whoosh of a sword swung through the air
sounds.usage: Swinging the sword (miss / wind-up).

sounds.name: Sword Hit
sounds.description: a sharp metallic clang of a sword striking a target
sounds.usage: Sword connecting with an enemy or object.

sounds.name: Axe Chop
sounds.description: a heavy wooden thock of an axe biting into a tree
sounds.usage: Chopping oak_tree / pine_tree with the axe.

sounds.name: Pickaxe Hit
sounds.description: a sharp stony crack of a pickaxe striking rock
sounds.usage: Mining rock / ore with the pickaxe.

sounds.name: Hoe Till
sounds.description: a gritty dig of a hoe breaking soil
sounds.usage: Tilling a soil tile with the hoe.

sounds.name: Watering Can
sounds.description: a soft splash of water poured from a watering can
sounds.usage: Watering crops with the watering can.

sounds.name: Footstep (Grass)
sounds.description: a soft muffled step on grass
sounds.usage: Per-step while walking on grass/foliage tiles.

sounds.name: Footstep (Stone)
sounds.description: a crisp tap of a step on stone or pavement
sounds.usage: Per-step while walking on stone/path tiles.

sounds.name: Footstep (Wood)
sounds.description: a hollow knock of a step on a wooden floor
sounds.usage: Per-step while walking on wood/bridge tiles.

sounds.name: Jump
sounds.description: a short upward blip as the character hops
sounds.usage: Character jump / hop.

sounds.name: Water Splash
sounds.description: a wet splash of stepping or falling into water
sounds.usage: Entering water / fishing bobber landing.

sounds.name: Take Damage
sounds.description: a short pained grunt-blip when the player takes damage
sounds.usage: Player / entity takes damage.

sounds.name: Enemy Defeat
sounds.description: a descending puff as an enemy is defeated and vanishes
sounds.usage: Enemy defeated / despawns.

sounds.name: Explosion
sounds.description: a punchy boom for bombs and destructible objects
sounds.usage: Bombs, barrels, destructibles breaking.

sounds.name: Magic Cast
sounds.description: a shimmering rising sweep of casting a spell
sounds.usage: Casting a spell / using magic.

sounds.name: Level Up
sounds.description: a bright ascending fanfare for gaining a level
sounds.usage: Player gains a level / skill increases.

sounds.name: Quest Complete
sounds.description: a triumphant little jingle marking a completed quest
sounds.usage: Completing a quest / objective.
